item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 10 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Eliom 12: Client-server applications in Web Assembly
  2. melange-str: Str module for Melange
  3. Outreachy May 2026
  4. Research engineer or postdoc position at Inria Rennes: static analysis of OCaml programs
  5. RFC: multifile ATD definition support via import statements
